faqs.question: How can I verify BeiLuo is an authorized Genuway distributor?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics is a core distributor of Genuway Technology products. You can verify our authorization by contacting Genuway directly or requesting our distributor certificate. We provide 100% genuine products with full manufacturer warranty.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for distributor verification.

faqs.question: What technical documentation is available for Genuway products?
faqs.answer: Complete documentation includes datasheets, application notes, reliability reports, and qualification certificates. All documentation is available in English.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical team for specific documentation requests.

articles.title: How to Select the Right Crystal Oscillator

author.name: Michael Chen
author.title: Senior FAE - Timing Products
author.bio: Michael Chen is a Senior Field Application Engineer specializing in timing products and crystal oscillator applications.

articles.summary: Comprehensive guide to selecting crystal oscillators based on stability, frequency, and application requirements.
content: Selecting the right crystal oscillator is critical for system performance.
Consider frequency stability, temperature range, and package size.
SPXO offers basic performance, TCXO provides temperature compensation, OCXO delivers highest stability.

faeInsights.insight: Most designers underestimate the importance of temperature stability.
faeInsights.logic: Select oscillator type based on stability requirements and budget.
bestPractices: Verify phase noise for RF apps

customerCases.problem: Customer had timing issues in base station design.
customerCases.diagnosis: Inadequate oscillator stability for the application.
customerCases.solution: Upgraded to TCXO with better stability.

faqs.question: What is the difference between SPXO and TCXO?
faqs.answer: SPXO is a simple packaged crystal oscillator without temperature compensation. TCXO includes temperature compensation circuitry for improved stability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose SPXO for cost-sensitive apps, TCXO for better stability.
